title: Holikme 3 Pack Dish Brush Set with Bamboo Handle, Kitchen Scrub Brush for Cleaning Dish, Pot, Sink and Stove, Skillet Scrubber with Tough Bristles for Cast Iron Grill Pan, Yellow White Black
features: [Soft Dish Brush] Soft bristles are suitable to tackle grease and grime yet safe to use on non-stick cookware. Built in scraper on brush head easily srubs stuck-on food. Great for cleaning dishes, pans, pots, sink, stoves and kitchen utensils
[Medium Pan Brush] Harder bristles are more suitable for cleaning stubborn stains, while effectively protecting the surface of kitchen items
[Cast Iron Brush] Tough bristles made of heat-resisting material is designed to safely clean your cast iron cookware, leaving seasoned skillets, pots and pans sparkling clean and free from damage
[Bamboo Handle] Our kitchen brushes built with natural bamboo handle. No strange smell and no damage to your kitchen utensils' surface.

[Ergonomic Handle] Masonry brush can be holded comfortably, which makes the tough scrubbing much easier. And each dish brush features a rope at the handle end for hanging option which allows for air dry. Long handle brush will protect your hand from cleaning most things around the kitchen without getting your hands wet and touching washing-up liquid
